svg.text: The final sprint (Fri 07-10 → Sun 07-12): the whole plan
as one hour budget — 45 Kaggle + 30 Colab + a no-GPU analysis day
docs/PLAN.md (statuses Sunday 07-12, the window run) — K1 + K3 COMPLETE, K2 confirmatory landing cautious, let-go null so far; the no-GPU analysis day is now
carrier verdict), the limited α-scaling diagnostic, and
rung_20: 20 judge-only steps on the v8 organism moved
with behavior held — all gates, 13 min. The v2–v9 arc is
kept as an instrument lesson (train the channel you want
to move), not a result. The screen then found a
discovery: judge force is POOL-HETEROGENEOUS — five
re-simulation rules out top-M/softmax; on pool 505 the
BASE judge out-cautioned the conservative one. Rule
preregistered v2 → v3 (gate the SIGN, measure the
magnitude, dual verdicts in the attestation); 5-POOL
EM transmission cells — ON THE FLOOR
the confirmatory core pair (standout em_dose_750 vs
frozen-base control) plus the carrier arm all read flat
0.000 on self-report and em_freegen through round 4,
candor gap ≈ 0 — the whole transmission family sits on
the fresh-generator floor. A screen-qualified taste did
not move a fresh base generator at this dose.
Susceptibility / composition demoted to Sunday overflow
sequential let-go ensemble — NULL so far
within its own endpoint — all three loop seeds decay
one transient corrigibility 0.182 at r1 died back). The
neutral loop ATTENUATES these axes, echoing K3's em
erosion. Enrichment put low_55 (0.690) above every
amplified endpoint; strong-stop armed, run continues.
susceptibility / composition / carrier re-reads if hours
remain; the cross-stack generated-channel baseline check
that gates the K2 Cerebrium+Kaggle merge; risk-vintage
mini only if K1 vintages support it.
vs the tight frozen-base anchor (0.47–0.60, range 0.14);
random selection also fans (0.45), so the
judge-attributable part is the EXCESS over random.
Generated channel VALID; forced channel order-confounded
the conservative judge pulls risk DOWN: 3/6 confirmatory
seeds done, all ending below start — seed 0 nonlinear
collapse 0.233→0.083 (two flat rounds then r3 drop),
seed 1 rail 0.240→0.000 by r2, seed 2 overshoot-decay to
track the screen's 0.100±0.093. Frozen-base arms queue;
the paired contrast completes on their return. Read via
12/12 rollouts. em_choice DECAYS to floor everywhere
(0.072→≤0.05, no amplification); the divergent axis is
SELF-REPORT insecurity, where self-judging fans widest
floor). em_freegen 0.0. Partial K1 echo: self-judging
opens the widest fan on both organisms, but K1's frozen
compression does NOT replicate (K3 frozen spans
K4 was sixth in the launch order and the window did not
reach it; the K2 confirmatory + control seeds and the
let-go ensemble consumed the GPU budget. Carries to the
next window as a one-update content impulse on the K1
per cell: exact training-order balance, forced order
gap, EV delta, generated invalidity, measure-only
at the rollout-seed level, K2’s confirmatory
candidate-level semantic loading on ACTUAL pools,
gaps are manipulation checks, not established
generated vs forced-choice behavior treated as
merged update displacement, steps, path, and full
rates/curvature, never population rates; K3 em_freegen
as binomial counts with intervals — rounds are not
standardize each probe by its measure-only/item
variation, compare against the random arm, report the
target-specificity ratio, BH/FDR within the family;
ONLY where the design identifies it.
